mapper.select: SELECT s.survey_id as surveyId , s.title as title , DATE_FORMAT(s.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') as createdAt , s.view_count as viewCount , s.use_yn as useYn , s.loginID as loginId , s.course_id as courseId , u.name as loginName FROM survey s LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON s.loginID = u.loginID WHERE s.survey_id = #{surveyId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(survey_id), 0) + 1 FROM survey
INSERT INTO survey ( survey_id, title, created_at, view_count, use_yn, loginID, course_id ) VALUES ( #{surveyId}, #{title}, NOW(), 0, #{useYn}, #{loginId}, #{courseId} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.course_id as courseId, c.title as title, c.professor as professor, cc.class_name as className, DATE_FORMAT(c.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as startDate, DATE_FORMAT(c.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as endDate FROM course c LEFT JOIN course_class cc ON c.class_id = cc.class_id ORDER BY c.course_id DESC
